title: To Sleep
content:
Come, Sleep! but mind ye! if you come without
The little girl that struck me at the rout,
By Jove! I would not give you half-a-crown
For all your poppy-heads and all your down.
meaning:
Walter Savage Landor's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "To Sleep"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
